# Databases technologies

Documentation and resources for migrating and managing enterprise data with security, reliability, high availability, and fully-managed data services on Google Cloud.

## Explore databases in Google Cloud

Read documentation and Cloud Architecture Center articles about database-related products, capabilities, and procedures.

## Training, blog articles, and more

Go to training courses, blog articles, and other related resources.

## Database products by use case

Expand sections or use the filter to find products and guides for typical use cases.
